name: ytdl-rmcp
description: Download audio/video from any yt-dlp-supported site, tag it, and transfer it to local, SSH, or rclone targets.

settings.name: Target path
settings.description: Destination for audio downloads. Use /path for local, host:/path or ssh:host:/path for SSH, and remote:path or rclone:remote:path for rclone.

settings.name: Video target path
settings.description: Destination for video downloads. Same forms as target path. Blank = same as target path.

settings.name: Deprecated SSH remote
settings.description: Deprecated compatibility alias. Legacy SSH remote alias or user@host; combines with audio/video destination paths. Prefer YTDLP_TARGET_PATH.

settings.name: Deprecated audio SSH path
settings.description: Deprecated compatibility alias. Legacy absolute SSH path for audio downloads. Prefer YTDLP_TARGET_PATH.

settings.name: Deprecated video SSH path
settings.description: Deprecated compatibility alias. Legacy absolute SSH path for video downloads. Prefer YTDLP_VIDEO_TARGET_PATH.

settings.name: Allow local targets
settings.description: Permit /path local filesystem destinations. Keep disabled unless you trust MCP callers to choose local write locations. Default: false.

settings.name: Default audio codec
settings.description: mp3 (default), m4a, opus, flac, wav, or best.

settings.name: Extra SSH options
settings.description: Shell-word parsed SSH options, e.g. -i "~/.ssh/ytdl key" -o ProxyJump=media-bastion. Malformed quoting is rejected. Optional.

settings.name: Download ledger path
settings.description: JSONL file where completed download calls are logged for youtube_stats. Optional.

settings.name: Plex server URL
settings.description: Optional Plex server base URL, e.g. http://plex.local:32400, used to add downloaded audio tracks to a Plex playlist.

settings.name: Plex token
settings.description: Optional Plex auth token for playlist/search API calls.

settings.name: Plex playlist
settings.description: Default Plex playlist title or ID. Default: yt-dlp Downloads. Can be overridden per youtube_download call.

settings.name: Clean title metadata
settings.description: Strip common YouTube title noise before embedding metadata. Default: true.

settings.name: AcoustID client key
settings.description: Application API key for AcoustID lookups used by youtube_identify.

settings.name: fpcalc path
settings.description: Optional path to the Chromaprint fpcalc executable. Blank = search PATH.

settings.name: MusicBrainz contact
settings.description: Contact URL or email included in the lookup User-Agent.

settings.name: yt-dlp extractor args
settings.description: Passed to yt-dlp's --extractor-args. The Android YouTube client keeps search/probe working for official music videos that reject yt-dlp's default clients.

settings.name: yt-dlp timeout seconds
settings.description: Maximum runtime for each yt-dlp probe/download command. Default: 1800.

settings.name: Transfer timeout seconds
settings.description: Maximum runtime budget for each transfer phase. Default: 600.

settings.name: yt-dlp path
settings.description: Use a specific yt-dlp executable instead of auto-resolution/auto-download. Optional.

settings.name: ffmpeg path
settings.description: Use a specific ffmpeg executable instead of auto-resolution/auto-download. Optional.

settings.name: yt-dlp SHA-256 pin
settings.description: Optional SHA-256 digest required for the resolved yt-dlp executable.

settings.name: ffmpeg SHA-256 pin
settings.description: Optional SHA-256 digest required for the resolved ffmpeg executable.
